# ITAYOST - Custom Web Development & Business Automation

> ITAYOST (itayost.com) is a freelance full-stack development studio run by Itay Ostraich, serving small and medium businesses in Israel. We build custom websites, CRM systems, business automations, e-commerce stores, mobile apps, landing pages, and UI/UX design — all tailored to each client's specific needs.

## Services

- [Web Development](https://www.itayost.com/services/web-development): Custom websites built with Next.js and React. Fast (sub-second load times), secure, SEO-optimized, full Hebrew RTL support.
- [CRM Systems](https://www.itayost.com/services/crm-systems): Custom CRM development for lead tracking, client management, and deal pipelines. Integrates with WhatsApp, email, and calendar.
- [Business Automations](https://www.itayost.com/services/automations): Workflow automation connecting existing systems (Gmail, Sheets, CRM, WhatsApp). Built with Make, Zapier, n8n, or custom integrations.
- [E-commerce](https://www.itayost.com/services/ecommerce): Online stores with Israeli payment integration (Bit, PayBox, Tranzila). Inventory management, shipping, analytics.
- [Mobile Apps](https://www.itayost.com/services/mobile-apps): Cross-platform apps with React Native for iOS and Android. Push notifications, offline support, app store publishing.
- [Landing Pages](https://www.itayost.com/services/landing-pages): High-converting landing pages for campaigns and launches. A/B testing, analytics, fast delivery (3-7 days).
- [UI/UX Design](https://www.itayost.com/services/ui-ux-design): Research-based interface design in Figma. User testing, design systems, WCAG 2.1 accessibility.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.itayost.com/): Overview of services and proof points
- [Portfolio](https://www.itayost.com/portfolio): Case studies including Lola Martin (restaurant, 200% increase in online reservations), Shepes Group (real estate, 180% increase in leads), Kitchen Optimizer (restaurant management system)
- [Blog](https://www.itayost.com/blog): 22 articles in Hebrew on web development, app development, SEO, security, and technology comparisons for Israeli business owners
- [FAQ](https://www.itayost.com/faq): 18 frequently asked questions about services, pricing, process, and technology
- [About](https://www.itayost.com/about): Background on Itay Ostraich — 5+ years experience, 100+ projects, full-stack developer
- [Clients](https://www.itayost.com/clients): Testimonials and success stories from 50+ clients
- [Contact](https://www.itayost.com/contact): Contact form and WhatsApp (054-499-4417)

## Blog Topics

Articles cover practical topics for Israeli business owners (all in Hebrew):

- Website pricing and cost guides for Israel
- React vs WordPress comparisons
- SEO basics for small businesses
- App development costs and checklists
- HTTPS security explained
- E-commerce platform comparisons
- Website speed optimization
- Custom CRM vs SaaS (Monday, HubSpot)
- AI website builders vs human developers
- Mobile-first design importance
- Website maintenance costs

## Tech Stack

Next.js 14, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, React Native, Framer Motion, GSAP. Deployed on Vercel.

## Location & Contact

Based in Ramat Gan, Israel. Serves businesses across Israel (remote work supported).
- Phone/WhatsApp: 054-499-4417
- Email: itayost1@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.itayost.com

## Proof Points

- 50+ clients served
- 100+ projects completed
- Average 15 hours saved per week per client
- Average 30% revenue growth for clients
- PageSpeed scores: 90-98/100
- 6-month warranty included with every project
